hero.name: Mathias Brichta
hero.tagline: I help businesses modernize operations through strategy, automation, and AI.
hero.subheading: From process documentation to intelligent workflows and custom AI agents, I partner with you to turn operational challenges into scalable digital systems.

services.heading: How I can improve your business

items.title: Integrated Digital Strategy
items.description: I assist you in creating a complete digital strategy. From defining your goals to implementing concrete solutions, I work with you to build a clear and measurable plan to drive your business growth.

items.title: Process Documentation (SOPs)
items.description: I create standard operating procedures and manuals to ensure every task and operation in your business is documented and easy to replicate.

items.title: Process Automation
items.description: I implement tools like chatbots, workflows, and custom systems to save you time and money.

items.title: AI Agent Development
items.description: Automate complex processes and drive innovation within your organization by integrating advanced AI solutions tailored to your specific needs.

items.title: Digital Tools Optimization
items.description: I simplify your processes by removing unnecessary tools and replacing them with integrated workflows tailored to your business.

howItWorks.heading: Progressing Through Digital Phases
howItWorks.description: Every company has its own path to digital transformation. My goal is to help you identify your current phase and guide you toward a more efficient, automated model aligned with today's market demands.

phases.title: Analog Operations
points: Minimal or no use of digital tools.

phases.title: Cloud Silos
points: Use of basic digital tools (Google Workspace, Excel).

phases.title: Integrated Cloud
points: Better data flow, but with semi-manual processes.

phases.title: Unified Data Layer
points: All data centralized in a single platform.
Decisions are based on accurate, real-time information.

phases.title: Automated Workflows
points: Human intervention limited to key decisions.

phases.title: AI Automation
points: Implementation of artificial intelligence for predictive tasks.

about.heading: About Me
about.name: Mathias Brichta
about.title: Business Analyst & Developer
about.description: I'm passionate about helping businesses transition into the digital age by analyzing their needs and creating effective solutions. With experience in development and a keen eye for process optimization, I bridge the gap between business challenges and technical solutions.

howWeWork.heading: How I Work
howWeWork.subheading: I combine strategy and technology to optimize your processes — from discovery to implementation.

steps.title: Align and Prioritize
steps.content: I understand your needs and bottlenecks to define clear priorities.

steps.title: Document and Unify
steps.content: I map processes and centralize information for a single source of truth.

steps.title: Automate, Delegate, Eliminate
steps.content: I identify tasks that can be automated or delegated for greater efficiency.

steps.title: Implement and Grow
steps.content: I train your team and oversee the launch for sustainable growth.

contactSection.heading: Get in Touch
contactSection.description: Tell me about your business and I'll get back to you to explore how I can help.
